svg.text: Where each packet type originates inside a router

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does a router ARP for a next-hop IP on an interface?')
sendPrompt('What triggers an OSPF Hello packet to be sent?')
sendPrompt('What is the difference between an LSA and an LSU in OSPF?')

svg.text: protocol layer — how it reaches IP

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a raw socket and how does it bypass TCP/UDP?')

sendPrompt('Can OSPF use a raw socket for LSA flooding?')
